OM is competitive and would like to give $2-$3M a year in annuity business based on rates.  Top carriers:  RBC, is their top one! Eric Palmer - Director of Sales He has been doing this for 30yrs. (Eric@brokersalliance.com)  They have 3 annuity internal annuity marketers and 5 external people.  Also have 15 life people.  Licensing - Eilene x104 Case Mgr. - Myra x 118, (she touches every app & scrubs them).  Note:  I'm working on setting up a webinar to take place on June 2nd @ 10:00 PC time. PZ  5/20/10

column109: After graduating from Appalachian State University with a bachelorÍs degree in Marketing and Computer Information Systems, I joined the family at Financial Independence Group in Cornelius, North Carolina. I started as the Head Recruiter for the Securities Division of Financial Independence Group. During that time I was in charge of bringing new registered representatives to the broker dealer of Financial Independence Group.// After some successful years, I moved into the Annuity Division at Financial Independence Group as one of their Sales Consultants. Since that move, I have built a strong book of advisors, and help them on a daily basis with everything from complicated case design and product selection to overall business planning and augmentation.// It is my responsibility to make sure the advisors I partner with:// -- Have a team member that will be accountable and hold them accountable to do the right thing for their clients all the time/ -- Are properly coached and prepared so they can be the best advisor in their area/ -- Have access to a 100 person support team to help them be more effective and efficient in their practices/ -- Enjoy what they do in helping families secure their wealth, retirement, and legacy plans// Most people search a lifetime to find something they love to do. I feel very fortunate to have found something that I have such a passion for and love to do. If you asked most people what they love about their job they would have a tough time answering. I don't have this problem because to me its not a job its a way of life!// If you are an independent financial advisor seeking a true partner and professional consultant then connect with me today so we can help you maximize YOUR 4 P's:// 1: Productivity - how to do more in less time/ 2: Payoff - the level of success you want to achieve/ 3: Pleasure - enjoy more free time and time away from work with your family and loved ones/ 4: Prestige - what impact you will have in this industry and this world

column109: I attended the University of North Carolina at Charlotte where I studied Business Management. In my third year of college, I was offered a full-time sales position with Financial Independence Group. At that time UNCC did not have a night studies program for Business Management so I made the decision to take the job at FIG and find a college that would allow me to work full-time but still finish school. I enrolled at Montreat College here in Charlotte and graduated with a BachelorÍs degree in Business Management and a minor in Business Marketing. In September of 2007 I started my carrier as a marketing and sales consultant in the annuity division. I was 1 of 18 annuity marketing consultants, with fewer than 80 employees and a annual annuity production level under $1 Billion. I was given a great opportunity to be a part of exponential growth with this company through the years. column109: I attended the University of North Carolina at Charlotte where I earned a Bachelor of Science degree in Finance with a concentration in Banking. My intentions after graduating were to engage in a career in banking as a financial analyst. Unfortunately the year I graduated First Union and Wachovia were going through a merger which created a hiring freeze in the Charlotte banking industry.// This forced me to look outside of banking and led me to Financial Independence Group, now one of the largest independent insurance distribution organizations in the country. When I was hired in 2001 I was the 12th employee of this company and our annual annuity sales were under $50 million. I have had a great opportunity to be a part of exponential growth with this company through the years. I have developed great relationships with many advisors all around the country. My annual sales are now $100 + million in annuity premium and FIGÍs annuity sales are $2 billion annually.// I am very grateful that I can help influence the lives of independent financial advisors both personally and financially by providing a set of tailored and unique services. I not only provide products that can benefit their clients, but also a very valuable combination of services and knowledge that is critical in enhancing their business focused around preservation of principal with safe income planning techniques.// If you are an independent advisor, I would like the opportunity to speak with you and explain our value added services. The best way to contact me is through email at brian.bailey@figmarketing.com
